ddls:
CREATE TABLE "systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the system */,
  "function" TEXT /* Function or role of the system */,
  "cpu" TEXT /* CPU specifications */,
  "memory" TEXT /* Memory specifications */,
  "disk" TEXT /* Disk space */,
  "derived_from" TEXT /* The entity or concept the system is derived from */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the system */,
  "system_status" TEXT /* Current status of the system */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_monitoring" (
  "monitoring_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system being monitored */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* Current CPU usage percentage */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Current memory usage percentage */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Current disk usage percentage */,
  "disk_read_write_speed" REAL /* Disk read and write speeds */,
  "network_throughput" REAL /* Network throughput */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the monitoring data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monitoring_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_monitoring_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system with this configuration */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version */,
  "software_installed" TEXT /* List of installed software */,
  "network_settings" TEXT /* Network settings */,
  "security_policies" TEXT /* Security policies in place */,
  "bios_version" TEXT /* BIOS version of the system */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_configurations_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_enhancements" (
  "enhancement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enhancement */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system with the enhancement */,
  "enchantment_name" TEXT /* Name of the enchantment or charm */,
  "enchantment_type" TEXT /* Type of enchantment */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Description of the effect on the system */,
  "enchantment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enchantment */,
  "applied_date" TEXT /* Date the enhancement was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enhancement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_enhancements_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "primary_system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary system */,
  "dependent_system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system that depends on the primary system */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency */,
  "dependency_description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_dependencies_primary_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_dependencies_dependent_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system the user has access to */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the system */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_users_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken during the access */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the system was accessed */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_access_logs_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES system_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system with the issue */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* User who reported the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "reported_time" TEXT /* Time the issue was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue */,
  "issue_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue */,
  "issue_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_issues_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system undergoing maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of maintenance */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_result" TEXT /* Result of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_maintenance_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system for which the report is generated */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period covered by the report */,
  "cpu_performance" REAL /* CPU performance metrics */,
  "memory_performance" REAL /* Memory performance metrics */,
  "disk_performance" REAL /* Disk performance metrics */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the performance reports */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the performance reports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_performance_reports_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_backup" (
  "backup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backup */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system backed up */,
  "backup_type" TEXT /* Type of backup performed */,
  "backup_size" REAL /* Size of the backup */,
  "backup_time" TEXT /* Time the backup was taken */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the backup */,
  "backup_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of backups */,
  "backup_storage_location" TEXT /* Location where backups are stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_backup_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_software" (
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software installation */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system where the software is installed */,
  "software_name" TEXT /* Name of the software */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the software was installed */,
  "software_license" TEXT /* Software license information */,
  "software_support_status" TEXT /* Support status of the software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_software_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_network" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network configuration */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system with this network configuration */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address assigned to the system */,
  "subnet_mask" TEXT /* Subnet mask for the system */,
  "default_gateway" TEXT /* Default gateway for the system */,
  "dns_servers" TEXT /* DNS servers used by the system */,
  "network_speed" TEXT /* Network speed */,
  "network_vlan" TEXT /* VLAN configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_network_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id")
)
